data.name: CountryMustExist
data.value: Country with id {0} does not exist.

data.name: EntityNotFound_ForId
data.value: Entity with ID '{0}' could not be found.

data.name: MidAirCollision
data.value: A mid-air collision occured while saving.

data.name: MustBeActive
data.value: Action can only be applied by the active {0}, not by {1}.

data.name: MustBeInPhase
data.value: Action must be in {0} phase te be executed, not in {1} phase.

data.name: MustHaveArmiesToAttack
data.value: County {0} lacks an army to attack.

data.name: MustNotBeOwnedBy
data.value: Country {0} must not be owned by {1}.

data.name: MustNotExeedArmyBuffer
data.value: Action not be exucuted as it requires more armies ({1}) then available ({0}).
